info.description: Decentralized savings circles on Stellar. REST API for circles, contributions, payouts, reputation, and governance.
info.title: Moistello API

get.description: Returns the system audit log. Admin only.
Lists all circles with pagination, search, and status filter. Admin only.

post.description: Enables or disables a feature flag. Admin only.

get.description: Returns platform-wide metrics (users, circles, volume). Admin only.
Lists all users with pagination and search. Admin only.

post.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile. Requires Bearer token.
Returns a signed nonce for wallet authentication. The nonce must be signed with the wallet's private key and sent to /auth/verify.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token and refresh token pair.
Verifies wallet signature and creates a user account with optional profile fields (displayName, email, countryCode, language). Returns JWT tokens.
Verifies a signed nonce to prove wallet ownership. Creates a user account if one doesn't exist. Returns JWT tokens.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of savings circles with optional search, status, and type filters.

post.description: Creates a new savings circle. Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns a single savings circle by ID.
Lists all invite codes for a circle. Circle owner only.

post.description: Generates a new invite code for a circle. Circle owner only.
Joins an existing savings circle. Requires an invite code if the circle is private.

get.description: Returns paginated contributions filtered by userId, circleId, or the authenticated user's own contributions.
Returns a single contribution by ID.
Liveness probe — returns 200 if service is running.

delete.description: Revokes an invite code so it can no longer be used.

get.description: Returns paginated notifications for the authenticated user. Use ?unread=true to filter unread only.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's notification channel preferences and mute status.

patch.description: Marks every unread notification for the authenticated user as read.
Marks a single notification as read.

get.description: Returns paginated payouts filtered by userId, circleId, or the authenticated user's own payouts.
Returns a single payout by ID.
Readiness probe — checks database and Redis connectivity.
Returns the authenticated user's profile.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile fields (displayName, email, countryCode, preferredLanguage).

get.description: Returns all circles the authenticated user belongs to.

post.description: Starts the KYC verification process for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the current KYC verification status of the authenticated user.
Returns the authenticated user's MoiScore reputation.
Returns a user's public profile by wallet address or user ID.
Lists all registered webhooks for the authenticated user.

post.description: Registers a new webhook endpoint to receive event notifications.

delete.description: Deletes a registered webhook by ID.

BearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from /auth/verify or /auth/register. Format: "Bearer <token>"
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
